reviews.review_description: When I joined I met one of the staff and they were really nice and showed me around.he also showed all phases of the kick stuff and also gave me in game currency so I can buy cosmetics (with the owners permission ofc)

Hi im PolarBro, and im currently an admin for this game. Here’s what the game includes: The game has different mods that you could use, for example long arms, speedboost, tracers, and many more!
The main owner at the moment is AstroPL and Eternity. 
The game also has a discord server with 1K+ members!
You can find a button inside stump to join it.
Anyways. I really like this game, it will have more updates in the future! Hope you have an amazing time in this game. 5/5 stars

reviews.review_description:
don't download this game all i could see is all black screen 

and then after when i went back in the game all i could see is my room

In general, the game is really great. The long arms and the motion speed give it an even funner time, especially with cosmetics and the ability to buy as many as you want. But more importantly, the admin and moderators are really nice. They give you fist bumps constantly, and this is a really great game in general.
I love this game it bringsvme joy

reviews.review_title: Fix this bug im stlicking to the walls
reviews.review_description: Good game but you need to fix this bug

developer_response.body: Hello, This can happen due to performance with headsets. On the wall there is a URP setting disabling that can help.
